Graph: graph-001
Flow: onboarding
Status: running

Nodes
- investigate [succeeded] investigate risk=low
  CLI: asa graph status graph-001
- implement [blocked] implement risk=high
  blocked by: investigate
  CLI: asa graph status graph-001

Actions
- open node (stub)
- view dependencies (stub)
- export mermaid/json: asa graph visualize <graph-id> --format mermaid

Events
Filter: all (stub)  Search: (none)
CLI: asa runtime events --type <filter> --search <query>
- 11:00:00  graph.generated
- 11:01:00  graph.blocked
